fig1-rc-time-circuit.description: Fig 1(a): Series RC circuit for step (time) response

fig2-rc-freq-circuit.description: Fig 1(b): Series RC circuit for frequency response

fig3-rlc-circuit.description: Fig 2: Series RLC circuit for time and frequency response analysis

obs-rc-step-response.description: Oscilloscope output: Transient response of RC circuit to a step (square wave) input at ~5 kHz

obs-rlc-time-response.description: Oscilloscope output: Time response of the RLC circuit showing underdamped oscillation
